zh.lifeSummary: Susanna Smyth於大約1402年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德。她於1424年與Symon Fiske在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年2月26日在她的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Smyth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ronan, Aidan, Brigid, Conor, Eoin, Malachy, Paddy.
English: variant of   Smith  . This form of the surname is particularly common Ireland.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: Susanna Smyth was born about 1402, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Symon Fiske in 1424, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 February 1463, in her hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, E: All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Susanna Smyth est née environ 1402, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Symon Fiske en 1424, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1463, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, E: All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Susanna Smyth wurde um 1402 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1424 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England Symon Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Februar 1463 im Alter von 62 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Smythは約1402年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた。1424年にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでSymon Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年2月26日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, E: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Smyth(은)는 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 Symon Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 2월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

ru.All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, E: алл сеинц' чурч, лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Susanna Smyth родилась около 1402 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Symon Fiske в 1424 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 февраля 1463 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц' чурч, лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
